summary: Completed comprehensive testing of salon billing software. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend has session persistence issue affecting appointments page testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence issue causing intermittent logouts during navigation

integration_issues.issue: Inconsistent access to appointments page due to session issues

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue in frontend authentication. The session occasionally expires or resets during navigation, causing users to be redirected to login page unexpectedly. This prevents consistent testing of appointments page features.
